title: Qowre' #6981
definition:
Kore = "crier"

 1) a Korahite Levite, ancestor of Shallum and Meshelemiah, chief
    porters in the reign of David
 2) a Levite, son of Imnah, in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kore = "crier"

 1) a Korahite Levite, ancestor of Shallum and Meshelemiah, chief
    porters in the reign of David
 2) a Levite, son of Imnah, in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah

    NASB:  crier, two Levites
